title: Mexican Cornmeal Wrap
description: A delicious Mexican-inspired wrap made with a crispy cornmeal crust, filled with flavorful syrian ingredients.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mix together cornmeal, cumin, chili powder, and salt.
2. Gradually add in water and stir until a dough forms.
3. Knead dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
5. Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
6. Brush both sides with a little water.
7. Place a wrap on a hot skillet or griddle, cook for 1-2 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes or until crispy.
9. Fill each wrap with Syrian pepper, cheese, and a spoonful of ienergizing sauce.
